# AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(_:_:_:_:_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(_:_:_:_:_:) ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectgetpropertydatasize(_:_:_:_:_:))

-  AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(_:_:_:_:_:) 

Function# AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(_:_:_:_:_:)

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
func AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(
    _ inObjectID: AudioObjectID,
    _ inAddress: UnsafePointer<AudioObjectPropertyAddress>,
    _ inQualifierDataSize: UInt32,
    _ inQualifierData: UnsafeRawPointer?,
    _ outDataSize: UnsafeMutablePointer<UInt32>
) -> OSStatus
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectgetpropertydatasize(_:_:_:_:_:)#parameters)

`inObjectID`The AudioObject to query.

`inAddress`An AudioObjectPropertyAddress indicating which property is being queried.

`inQualifierDataSize`A UInt32 indicating the size of the buffer pointed to by inQualifierData. Note that not all properties require qualification, in which case this value will be 0.

`inQualifierData`A buffer of data to be used in determining the data of the property being queried. Note that not all properties require qualification, in which case this value will be NULL.

`outDataSize`A UInt32 indicating how many bytes the data for the given property occupies.

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectgetpropertydatasize(_:_:_:_:_:)#return-value)

An OSStatus indicating success or failure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectgetpropertydatasize(_:_:_:_:_:)#discussion)

Queries an AudioObject to find the size of the data for the given property.

## [See Also](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectgetpropertydatasize(_:_:_:_:_:)#see-also)
